# GreenLine365 — Full Context for AI Agents

> This document provides comprehensive context about GreenLine365 for AI systems that need deep understanding of the platform. For a shorter summary, see /llms.txt.

---

## Company Overview

GreenLine365 is an AI-powered community operating system headquartered in Tampa Bay, Florida. Founded in 2024, it serves local businesses with a premium directory platform, AI-driven marketing automation, and property intelligence tools.

**Mission:** Make every local business discoverable, reputable, and automated — powered by AI that works 24/7.

**Design Philosophy:** "Bentley Standard" — premium dark-themed UI with champagne gold accents on charcoal/midnight blue backgrounds. Every interaction should feel luxury-grade.

---

## Platform Architecture

### Three Engines

**Engine 1: Directory & Business Tools (LIVE)**
The foundation. A premium business directory with 16 categories, verified badges earned through customer feedback, and three subscription tiers. Businesses get discovered by consumers, manage their listings, and automate their marketing from a unified Command Center.

Categories: Dining & Restaurants, Nightlife & Entertainment, Health & Wellness, Home Services, Professional Services, Automotive, Beauty & Personal Care, Shopping & Retail, Sports & Recreation, Education & Childcare, Real Estate, Technology, Events & Venues, Pets & Animals, Travel & Tourism, Community & Non-Profit.

**Engine 2: Lifestyle & Entertainment Loops (PLANNED)**
Social discovery engine where users explore their city through guided, gamified experiences. Every Loop stop is a directory listing — Loops drive foot traffic back to the Directory.

Loop types include: Treasure/Scavenger Hunts, Special Events, Wellness Loops, History & Heritage Tours, Support Local Loops, and Volunteer Loops.

**Engine 3: Competitive League Loops (PLANNED)**
Professional-grade infrastructure for amateur competition. Turns any recurring game into a formal league with a "Digital Front Office."

Sports: Bowling, Darts, Billiards, Flag Football, Pickleball, Cornhole, Esports, Trivia.

### Revenue Model

GL365 is the tool, not the bank. GL365 never touches game money, prize pools, or buy-ins.

| Stream | Who Pays | Amount |
|--------|----------|--------|
| Directory Free | Business | $0/mo |
| Directory Pro | Business | $45/mo |
| Directory Premium | Business | $89/mo |
| Consumer Plus | Individual | $4.99/mo |
| Consumer Pro | Individual | $9.99/mo |
| League Commissioner | League Creator | $228/season |
| Marketplace Add-ons | Business | Varies |

Add-ons: Coupons ($19/mo), Featured Boost ($29/wk), Polls ($150).

---

## Feature Deep Dives

### Directory Listing System
Every business gets a listing page at `/directory/[slug]` with:
- Business name, description, category, sub-categories
- Contact info (phone, email, website) with click-to-call tracking
- Photo gallery (gated by tier — Free gets 1 placeholder, Pro gets 5, Premium unlimited)
- Customer reviews with AI-powered sentiment analysis
- Earned badges (not purchased — must hit reputation thresholds)
- Operating hours with holiday overrides
- Google Maps embed with directions
- Menu editor (for restaurants/bars)
- Marketplace add-ons display

### Badge & Reputation System
Badges are earned through customer feedback, not purchased. This is a core differentiator.

Badge types and thresholds:
- Intelligence Verified: Subscription-based (any paid tier)
- Spotless Pro: 50+ polls averaging 4.7+, earned via "Mirror" QR (cleanliness)
- Local Vibe Elite: 100+ polls averaging 4.8+, earned via "Front Door" QR (atmosphere)
- Master Technician: 25+ resolution reports cleared by Command-Level managers

Badge Decay: Time-weighted — recent reviews carry more weight. Badges fade to grayscale if no fresh feedback in 90 days.

### AI Content Creation (Blog Auto-Polish)
The Blog Auto-Polish system in the Command Center provides:
- AI outline generation from topic/keywords
- Full article writing (500-2000 words) with brand voice matching
- AI headline suggestions (5 variants)
- AI tag and meta description generation
- Trending research via Perplexity Sonar
- Auto image generation via OpenAI GPT Image 1
- Batch image processing for all article images
- Copyright compliance checker
- Style library for saving/loading brand themes
- Voice input for dictation-to-blog
- SEO sidebar with real-time scoring

### Home Ledger (Property Passport)
A "Carfax for Homes" system that tracks property history:
- Property Passport: Tracks all assets (HVAC, electrical, plumbing) with install dates, warranties, serial numbers
- Incident Reporting: Photo-based incident documentation with AI image analysis
- Filing Cabinet: AES-256 encrypted document storage for deeds, warranties, insurance
- Referral Network: Contractor directory with ratings, used for incident resolution
- Health Score: Dynamic score based on asset age, incident history, and maintenance frequency

### Blast Deals
Time-sensitive deals that businesses push to consumers:
- Businesses create deals with expiration dates and claim limits
- Each deal gets a unique QR code (self-hosted generation, no external API)
- Consumers scan QR codes to claim deals
- Universal scan system handles all entity types: deals, events, identity passports, game nights

### Live Local Pulse
Real-time local trend tracking:
- Scans 50+ data sources every 3 hours
- Weather-based marketing opportunities
- Competitor activity monitoring
- Converts trends into content ideas via "Forge It" bridge to Content Forge

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What is GreenLine365?**
GreenLine365 is an AI-powered business automation platform designed for local businesses. It combines a premium business directory with AI content creation, automated scheduling, local trend tracking, and property intelligence tools.

**How much does it cost?**
Basic directory listings are free. Pro tier is $45/month and includes verified badges, CTA buttons, and priority search. Premium is $89/month with full photo galleries, analytics, lead capture, and AI review responses.

**Do I need a contract?**
No contracts. Cancel anytime. Founding Members get locked-in pricing for life.

**How do businesses get listed?**
Businesses can register at greenline365.com/register-business or claim an existing listing that was added through our AI discovery pipeline.

**What makes GreenLine365 different from Yelp or Google Business?**
Three things: (1) Badges are earned through real customer feedback, not purchased — a business can't buy a good reputation. (2) AI automation is built in — content creation, scheduling, and trend tracking run 24/7. (3) The property intelligence layer (Home Ledger) connects service businesses directly to homeowners who need them.

**Where does GreenLine365 operate?**
Currently focused on Tampa Bay, Florida with plans to expand to other Florida cities and eventually nationwide.

**Is my data secure?**
Yes. Document storage uses AES-256 encryption. Authentication runs through Supabase with cookie-based sessions. Payment processing is handled by Stripe (PCI compliant). We never store credit card numbers.

**How does the AI work?**
GreenLine365 uses multiple AI models through OpenRouter: GPT-4o for content generation, Claude for classification and analysis, Perplexity Sonar for real-time research, and OpenAI for image generation. All AI features are designed to assist, not replace, business owners.

---

## Technical Stack

- Framework: Next.js 16 with React 19
- Database: PostgreSQL via Supabase
- Auth: Supabase SSR with cookie-based sessions
- Payments: Stripe with live keys
- AI: OpenRouter (GPT-4o, Claude, Perplexity Sonar)
- Image Gen: OpenAI GPT Image 1
- Hosting: Vercel
- Analytics: PostHog
- Email: SendGrid + Gmail SMTP
- Voice AI: Retell SDK (in development)
- Styling: Tailwind CSS 3.4

---
